title: ${{ }} vs ${ } in GitHub Actions: The Variable Interpolation Trap
excerpt: One runs before the shell ever starts, the other runs inside it — here's why that difference broke your workflow and how to use each correctly.
author: Reuben Oluwafemi

title: The CI/CD Syntax Error That Just Cost You 3 Hours of Debugging
excerpt: One missing colon in a YAML workflow file. Three hours of hair-pulling. Here's how to spot it faster next time.
author: Reuben Oluwafemi
